message:
feat(channel): add fault injection for message reorder/duplication (bd-2ktrc.1)

Implement FaultSender wrapper around MPSC Sender that injects
probabilistic message reordering and duplication on the send path.
All decisions are deterministic (seeded ChaosRng) and logged to
EvidenceSink for post-hoc debugging.

34 tests validate: no obligation leaks, idempotent duplicate handling,
eventual delivery under reorder, evidence logging, and determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
